description: Expected self-hosted runner inventory for Tr3kkR/Yuzu. The runner-inventory-sentinel workflow asserts GitHub's reported actions/runners state matches this declaration and fails loud on drift. Update deliberately: every change is a single-purpose PR with clear intent. When the actual inventory changes (new runner, retirement, label change) this file MUST be updated in the same change, or the sentinel fires on the next cron tick (every 30 min).

expected_runners.name: yuzu-wsl2-linux
expected_runners.role: Linux CI jobs — ci.yml proto-compat, linux matrix, sanitizer-asan, sanitizer-tsan, coverage. Also CodeQL Linux leg and sanitizer-tests.yml dispatches.

expected_runners.name: yuzu-local-windows
expected_runners.role: Windows MSVC CI jobs — ci.yml windows matrix (release + debug), codeql Windows leg.

expected_runners.name: scw-eager-lumiere
expected_runners.host: Scaleway VPS (Ubuntu 24.04, 4 vCPU, 7.7 GB RAM, ~45 GB disk)
expected_runners.role: Cloud-side Linux capacity sharing the [self-hosted, Linux, X64] label set with yuzu-wsl2-linux. The yuzu-cloud-builder label exists for future opt-in pinning of jobs that should land here specifically. Disk is tighter than the WSL2 box — sanitizer-tests.yml's ≥30 GB preflight will fail-fast if a sanitizer dispatch lands on this runner; that is intentional and the dispatch will retry on yuzu-wsl2-linux.
